footer.copyright: NexoPost is a brand of Uptexx Information Technologies.

privacy_content.text: NexoPost, an Uptexx Information Technologies brand, collects personal data (name, email) and social media tokens to provide scheduling services. We comply with GDPR and local KVKK regulations.
We use official APIs. Your social media passwords are never stored on our servers. Tokens are encrypted and used solely for publishing on your behalf.
Under the KVKK law, you have the right to request deletion of your data, learn how it's processed, and revoke access at any time through your dashboard.

terms_content.text: By accessing NexoPost, you agree to these terms. NexoPost acts as an intermediary tool for social media automation.
Users must not use the platform for spam. Posting frequency is strictly bound by official Meta, TikTok, X, and YouTube API rate limits.

All subscription payments are handled securely. Due to the recurring nature of the SaaS API usage, refunds are not organically provided past the 15-day trial, but can be managed by contacting our support.

cookies.text: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website according to privacy regulations (KVKK / GDPR).
